componentDescription: Menu is a dropdown list of actions triggered by clicking a button or icon. Use for contextual actions on items ('Edit', 'Delete', 'Duplicate'), toolbar action menus, and 'more options' (...) buttons. Unlike SingleSelect, Menu items trigger actions — they don't select values.
features: Destructive item styling for dangerous actions

usageExamples.title: Row actions menu
usageExamples.description: Three-dot menu for actions on a table row.
usageExamples.code:
<Menu
  trigger={
    <Button
      buttonType={ButtonType.SECONDARY}
      size={ButtonSize.SMALL}
      subType={ButtonSubType.ICON_ONLY}
      leadingIcon={<MoreHorizontalIcon />}
    />
  }
  items={[
    { label: 'Edit', icon: <EditIcon />, onClick: () => handleEdit(item) },
    { label: 'Duplicate', icon: <CopyIcon />, onClick: () => handleDuplicate(item) },
    { label: 'Archive', icon: <ArchiveIcon />, onClick: () => handleArchive(item), disabled: item.archived },
    { type: 'separator' },
    { label: 'Delete', icon: <TrashIcon />, onClick: () => handleDelete(item), destructive: true },
  ]}
/>

usageExamples.title: User account menu
usageExamples.description: Dropdown menu from the user avatar for account actions.
usageExamples.code:
<Menu
  trigger={<Avatar src={user.avatar} name={user.name} size="md" />}
  items={[
    { label: 'Your profile', icon: <UserIcon />, onClick: () => navigate('/profile') },
    { label: 'Account settings', icon: <SettingsIcon />, onClick: () => navigate('/settings') },
    { type: 'separator' },
    { label: 'Sign out', icon: <LogoutIcon />, onClick: handleSignOut },
  ]}
/>

trigger.llmContext: Required. The element that opens the menu on click. Typically a Button with ICON_ONLY subType (three-dot / kebab icon), an Avatar, or any clickable element. The trigger is rendered inline.
trigger.propDescription: Required. Element that opens the menu on click

items.llmContext: Required. Array of menu item objects. Each item: { label: string, icon?: ReactNode, onClick?: () => void, disabled?: boolean, destructive?: boolean } or { type: 'separator' } for dividers. Use destructive: true for delete/remove actions — renders in red to signal danger.
items.propDescription: Required. Array of menu item definitions and separators

onSelect.llmContext: Optional global callback fired when any item is selected, receiving the item. Use when you need centralized handling instead of per-item onClick handlers.
onSelect.propDescription: Called with selected item when user picks a menu option
